name: Operator Workbook Pack
description: Verification, QA, and RPM checklists for operator-grade execution

prompts.title: Weekly Verification Checklist (RPM)
prompts.prompt:
Generate a Weekly Review & Planning Meeting (RPM) checklist for a {{ROLE}} at a {{COMPANY_STAGE}} company.

Sections:
1. Metrics Review (5 mins) - Key numbers vs plan, variance explanation
2. Pipeline Health (10 mins) - Deal stages, stale deals, next actions
3. Product/Eng Health (10 mins) - Deploy frequency, bug ratio, tech debt
4. People/Org (5 mins) - Hiring, performance, blockers
5. Strategic Decisions (10 mins) - Decisions needed, owner, deadline
6. Action Items - Owner, due date, success criteria

Output format: Markdown table with checkboxes. Include "Last week's carryover" section.
prompts.notes: Run every Monday 9am. Time-box to 45 mins. Distribute notes in 15 mins. No status updates - only decisions and blockers.

prompts.title: Pre-Release Quality Gate
prompts.prompt:
Create a pre-release verification checklist for {{PRODUCT_TYPE}}.

Gates (all must pass):
- [ ] TypeScript strict: zero errors
- [ ] Lint: zero errors
- [ ] Unit tests: >80% coverage, all pass
- [ ] E2E smoke: critical path verified
- [ ] Build: production build succeeds
- [ ] Bundle size: within budget
- [ ] Security: no new vulnerabilities (npm audit)
- [ ] Env parity: staging matches prod config
- [ ] Rollback: tested in last 30 days
- [ ] Changelog: user-facing changes documented

Add product-specific gates for {{PRODUCT_TYPE}}.
prompts.notes: Enforced in CI. No merge to main without green. No deploy without manual approval on gate failure.

prompts.title: Incident Retrospective Template
prompts.prompt:
Produce a blameless incident retrospective for {{INCIDENT_TYPE}}.

Sections:
1. Timeline (UTC) - Detection, acknowledgment, mitigation, resolution
2. Impact - Users affected, revenue at risk, SLA breach
3. Root Cause - 5 Whys, contributing factors
4. What Went Well - Detection, communication, mitigation
5. What Didn't - Gaps in monitoring, runbooks, escalation
6. Action Items - [ ] Ticket, owner, due date, verification

Format: One-pager. No "human error" as root cause. Every action item = ticket in Linear/Jira.
prompts.notes: Publish within 48h. Review in next RPM. Close action items in 2 weeks or escalate.

prompts.title: Vendor / Tool Evaluation Scorecard
prompts.prompt:
Create an evaluation scorecard for {{CATEGORY}} tool/vendor selection.

Criteria (weighted):
- Core capability fit (30%) - Does it solve the job-to-be-done?
- Integration effort (20%) - API, webhooks, SSO, data migration
- Reliability/SLA (15%) - Uptime, support tier, incident history
- Cost model (15%) - Predictable, usage-based, seats
- Security/Compliance (10%) - SOC2, data residency, DPA
- Vendor viability (10%) - Funding, team, roadmap alignment

Scoring: 1-5 per criterion. Weighted total. Threshold: >3.5 to shortlist.

Output: Comparison table + recommendation + negotiation levers.
prompts.notes: Run eval in 1 week max. Two people max. Demo on your data, not theirs. Reference calls required before contract.

prompts.title: Hiring Loop - Operator Scorecard
prompts.prompt:
Generate an interview scorecard for {{ROLE}} (fractional COO / RevOps / GTM operator).

Dimensions (score 1-5 + evidence):
1. Operator DNA - Bias to action, owns outcomes, not tasks
2. Systems thinking - Builds repeatable, not heroic
3. Revenue fluency - Speaks pipeline, CAC, LTV, not vanity
4. Stakeholder mgmt - Influences without authority
5. Grit - Evidence of shipping through ambiguity
6. Tool competence - Can operate the stack (CRM, BI, SQL)

Interview flow: 30-min screen → 60-min case study (real problem) → 30-min values/refs

Pass threshold: 4.0 avg, no dimension <3. References: 2 former founders/CEOs.
prompts.notes: Case study = actual current problem. Pay for 2h of their time. No take-home projects.
